name: sportUA
description: SportUA is an online store for sports goods, created as a freelance project for a small business. The project allows users to quickly and conveniently purchase sports items online, featuring a unique design, dynamic product pages, and integration with databases for products, authentication, and cart functionality.
expirience: Full website development from scratch – from design to finished product.
Created dynamic pages for all products.
Integrated Firebase Auth for user authentication.
Implemented local cart and product management.
Combined Supabase Storage and Firebase for storing product images and data.
Developed React contexts for efficient state management.
Optimized site speed and responsiveness for different screens.
Created a unique design with clean component structure.
